T0075.title: Leaked Data
T0075.definition: In the context of the underground industry, broadly refers to various types of sensitive data illegally obtained and used for profit.
T0075.description: This data encompasses personal information, corporate secrets, login credentials, and more, serving as the foundational resource for online fraud, unauthorized transactions, and marketing scams. Within the underground supply chain, this data is often resold multiple times, processed from raw data into refined, high-value data, and ultimately used by downstream criminal groups for monetization.
